channel.title: veganuary TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from veganuary

item.title: Hundreds of thousands of tonnes of abandoned fishing gear enter our oceans annually...⁠ ⁠ This "ghost gear," which is made from synthetic plastics, can remain in ocean ecosystems for hundreds of years or more, continuing to trap and kill marine life long
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of tonnes of abandoned fishing gear enter our oceans annually...⁠ ⁠ This "ghost gear," which is made from synthetic plastics, can remain in ocean ecosystems for hundreds of years or more, continuing to trap and kill marine life long

item.title: Who else can relate? 😋 What's your favorite plant-milk? Comment below 👇 #soymilk #plantmilk #coffee #dairyfree #Veganuary
item.description: Who else can relate? 😋 What's your favorite plant-milk? Comment below 👇 #soymilk #plantmilk #coffee #dairyfree #Veganuary

item.title: There are so many new vegan foods to try in UK supermarkets! 🛒 What would you try first? 👇 #veganfooduk #veganuk #lidlvegan #vegantesco #newveganproducts @Waitrose & Partners @Tesco @Sainsbury’s @candykittens @LidlGB @Alpro @Little Moons @Oatly @THIS @gr
item.description: There are so many new vegan foods to try in UK supermarkets! 🛒 What would you try first? 👇 #veganfooduk #veganuk #lidlvegan #vegantesco #newveganproducts @Waitrose & Partners @Tesco @Sainsbury’s @candykittens @LidlGB @Alpro @Little Moons @Oatly @THIS @gr

item.title: Did you know that most meat on plates is from baby animals, not just lambs? 🐑 No animal in the meat industry is allowed to see adulthood. They are slaughtered in adolescence. so really, they’re all babies. These individuals deserve to live long, full live
item.description: Did you know that most meat on plates is from baby animals, not just lambs? 🐑 No animal in the meat industry is allowed to see adulthood. They are slaughtered in adolescence. so really, they’re all babies. These individuals deserve to live long, full live

item.title: Here are 5 creatively tasty ways to use that tin of chickpeas at the back of your cupboard! 🌱 Which of these would you try? 👇 #chickpea #chickpeas #chickpeacookiedough #chickpeatuna #chickpeasalad
item.description: Here are 5 creatively tasty ways to use that tin of chickpeas at the back of your cupboard! 🌱 Which of these would you try? 👇 #chickpea #chickpeas #chickpeacookiedough #chickpeatuna #chickpeasalad

item.title: They are just trying to live their lives too. 💚 We can all make a difference for them! By switching to a plant-based diet, we can help reduce our impact on the environment and protect the natural beauty of this world and its wildlife. 🌱 SHARE this reminde
item.description: They are just trying to live their lives too. 💚 We can all make a difference for them! By switching to a plant-based diet, we can help reduce our impact on the environment and protect the natural beauty of this world and its wildlife. 🌱 SHARE this reminde

item.title: Running the marathon? Or just want some lean protein inspiration? We got you! Here's what to get from Tesco when you need lean protein with no animal meat required! 🌱 Which of these did you have last? Let us know! Primary source for vegan lean protein so
item.description: Running the marathon? Or just want some lean protein inspiration? We got you! Here's what to get from Tesco when you need lean protein with no animal meat required! 🌱 Which of these did you have last? Let us know! Primary source for vegan lean protein so

item.title: When you see the word "creamy" or a flavour like "steak," you might assume the product isn't plant-based. But the truth is "creamy" doesn't always mean dairy, and "meaty" flavours are often just a mix of herbs and spices. There are so many examples of thi
item.description: When you see the word "creamy" or a flavour like "steak," you might assume the product isn't plant-based. But the truth is "creamy" doesn't always mean dairy, and "meaty" flavours are often just a mix of herbs and spices. There are so many examples of thi

item.title: There are so many reasons to leave tuna off our plates, but here are just three! 🌱 1. The Oceana nationwide seafood fraud investigation (2010-2012) documented in a 2013 study that through DNA testing, 84% of fish sold as "white tuna" at U.S. restaurants a
item.description: There are so many reasons to leave tuna off our plates, but here are just three! 🌱 1. The Oceana nationwide seafood fraud investigation (2010-2012) documented in a 2013 study that through DNA testing, 84% of fish sold as "white tuna" at U.S. restaurants a

item.title: If children don’t understand nature, how can they protect it? Right now, nature is under growing pressure. Around 96% of the world’s mammal biomass is made up of humans and livestock, leaving only around 4% as wild mammals. Livestock production has major
item.description: If children don’t understand nature, how can they protect it? Right now, nature is under growing pressure. Around 96% of the world’s mammal biomass is made up of humans and livestock, leaving only around 4% as wild mammals. Livestock production has major

item.title: Here are just a few of our favourite recent positive news stories! 👇 1. In a major win for animals, Etsy has announced a ban on the sale of all animal fur effective August 2026. 💚 2. Sodexo UK and Ireland collaborated with Greener By Default to provide pl
item.description: Here are just a few of our favourite recent positive news stories! 👇 1. In a major win for animals, Etsy has announced a ban on the sale of all animal fur effective August 2026. 💚 2. Sodexo UK and Ireland collaborated with Greener By Default to provide pl

item.title: Act now to QUADRUPLE your impact for animals! Those cows you see grazing in fields during the summer? If raised for beef, many are killed before they even reach two years of age. They are gentle, sweet, curious animals who, if allowed to live naturally, c
item.description: Act now to QUADRUPLE your impact for animals! Those cows you see grazing in fields during the summer? If raised for beef, many are killed before they even reach two years of age. They are gentle, sweet, curious animals who, if allowed to live naturally, c

item.title: Watch the full story of what happens when a father and daughter take a 600-mile road trip to give a calf a forever home! The documentary short 'Cow Trip' is available now on The Dodo's YouTube channel. 🎥 SHARE this with a friend to brighten their day! 🥰 C
item.description: Watch the full story of what happens when a father and daughter take a 600-mile road trip to give a calf a forever home! The documentary short 'Cow Trip' is available now on The Dodo's YouTube channel. 🎥 SHARE this with a friend to brighten their day! 🥰 C

item.title: We’re leaving the pressure behind. 🌱 Vegan eating can be simple, flexible, and realistic. What would you add to the “in” category? Comment below 👇 #vegan #plantbased #realistic #Veganuary
item.description: We’re leaving the pressure behind. 🌱 Vegan eating can be simple, flexible, and realistic. What would you add to the “in” category? Comment below 👇 #vegan #plantbased #realistic #Veganuary

item.title: There are so many new plant-based foods to try in UK supermarkets! 🛒🌱 SAVE this for your next food shop! 🥰 *Please note that at the time this was created, all products shown appeared to be vegan. We do our best, but labels and ingredients can change quick
item.description: There are so many new plant-based foods to try in UK supermarkets! 🛒🌱 SAVE this for your next food shop! 🥰 *Please note that at the time this was created, all products shown appeared to be vegan. We do our best, but labels and ingredients can change quick

item.title: Egg-free baking is well established, and many cakes, biscuits and other desserts can be made vegan with the right substitute. Different swaps work best for different jobs! For example, flax or chia mixtures can help with binding, fruit purées can add moi
item.description: Egg-free baking is well established, and many cakes, biscuits and other desserts can be made vegan with the right substitute. Different swaps work best for different jobs! For example, flax or chia mixtures can help with binding, fruit purées can add moi

item.title: And for animals, that change can make a meaningful difference. From swapping milk in your tea to trying hummus instead of a creamy dip, small changes can add up. Trying vegan doesn’t have to mean changing everything overnight. Start with the easy wins: so
item.description: And for animals, that change can make a meaningful difference. From swapping milk in your tea to trying hummus instead of a creamy dip, small changes can add up. Trying vegan doesn’t have to mean changing everything overnight. Start with the easy wins: so

item.title: They make the perfect shelter when it's late, cool, or pouring. 🌹 We think this is easily one of nature's cutest moments and one of the many reasons to admire bees. Despite their tiny size, they have a huge and vital impact on the environment and deserve
item.description: They make the perfect shelter when it's late, cool, or pouring. 🌹 We think this is easily one of nature's cutest moments and one of the many reasons to admire bees. Despite their tiny size, they have a huge and vital impact on the environment and deserve

item.title: There are so many plant-based cheeses now! There really is something for everyone. But what are your all-time favourites? We polled the Veganuary community to find the dairy-free cheeses that actually end up in your shopping baskets, and the results are i
item.description: There are so many plant-based cheeses now! There really is something for everyone. But what are your all-time favourites? We polled the Veganuary community to find the dairy-free cheeses that actually end up in your shopping baskets, and the results are i

item.title: For some species, survival odds may be even lower than 1 in 1,000... It is estimated that between 1 in 400 and 1 in 2,000 sea turtle hatchlings survive to adulthood, with many factors to blame. Some examples include ocean pollution, boat strikes, and clim
item.description: For some species, survival odds may be even lower than 1 in 1,000... It is estimated that between 1 in 400 and 1 in 2,000 sea turtle hatchlings survive to adulthood, with many factors to blame. Some examples include ocean pollution, boat strikes, and clim

item.title: Did you know sea otters are a keystone species? Keystone species play a crucial role in maintaining the health and diversity of ecosystems. Unfortunately, destructive commercial fishing practices such as bottom trawling are harming these ecosystems. 💔 The
item.description: Did you know sea otters are a keystone species? Keystone species play a crucial role in maintaining the health and diversity of ecosystems. Unfortunately, destructive commercial fishing practices such as bottom trawling are harming these ecosystems. 💔 The

item.title: Did you know the Grammy Award-winning artist has been plant-based for over ten years? We love seeing plant-based representation at the top of the music industry! 🎶 TAG your favourite vegan person who's dominating their industry—they can be an artist, acto
item.description: Did you know the Grammy Award-winning artist has been plant-based for over ten years? We love seeing plant-based representation at the top of the music industry! 🎶 TAG your favourite vegan person who's dominating their industry—they can be an artist, acto

item.title: You may not buy all of these on a weekly basis, but it just goes to show small savings can really add up! The best part is these swaps not only save money but also help save animals, as they are all plant-based! 🌱 SAVE this for your next food shop! 🛒 Savi
item.description: You may not buy all of these on a weekly basis, but it just goes to show small savings can really add up! The best part is these swaps not only save money but also help save animals, as they are all plant-based! 🌱 SAVE this for your next food shop! 🛒 Savi

item.title: Most of us weren’t born wanting to harm animals. 💛 Children naturally reach out to animals with curiosity, gentleness, and compassion. We cuddle them, name them, rescue them, and see them as friends long before we’re taught to see some differently from ot
item.description: Most of us weren’t born wanting to harm animals. 💛 Children naturally reach out to animals with curiosity, gentleness, and compassion. We cuddle them, name them, rescue them, and see them as friends long before we’re taught to see some differently from ot

item.title: 🇬🇧Subway has released a new summer BBQ Pulled Plant Protein Sub, which is available now at select UK stores! 🥪 🇺🇸 Louisville Jerky Co. have unveiled their new vegan Road Stick, made primarily from pea protein and designed for grab and go snacking, the roa
item.description: 🇬🇧Subway has released a new summer BBQ Pulled Plant Protein Sub, which is available now at select UK stores! 🥪 🇺🇸 Louisville Jerky Co. have unveiled their new vegan Road Stick, made primarily from pea protein and designed for grab and go snacking, the roa

item.title: Here are some of our favourite recent positive news stories! 👇 1. Brazil is on the verge of banning foie gras. The country’s Chamber of Deputies has approved a bill which bans the production and sale of foie gras, which now awaits the president's signatur
item.description: Here are some of our favourite recent positive news stories! 👇 1. Brazil is on the verge of banning foie gras. The country’s Chamber of Deputies has approved a bill which bans the production and sale of foie gras, which now awaits the president's signatur

item.title: Every animal deserves to be treated as an individual and not an ingredient. One of the best ways we can show kindness, compassion, and respect to all animals is by leaving them off our plates. 🌱 Leave a 💚 in the comments if you're eating vegan for the ani
item.description: Every animal deserves to be treated as an individual and not an ingredient. One of the best ways we can show kindness, compassion, and respect to all animals is by leaving them off our plates. 🌱 Leave a 💚 in the comments if you're eating vegan for the ani

item.title: Looking out the window for the first time, she realises she's finally safe. 💚 Belinda was rescued from a farm by trading her life for a broken wheelbarrow. It's wild to think that someone's life could be valued less than a broken piece of equipment, but s
item.description: Looking out the window for the first time, she realises she's finally safe. 💚 Belinda was rescued from a farm by trading her life for a broken wheelbarrow. It's wild to think that someone's life could be valued less than a broken piece of equipment, but s
